full_text:
Wei Shu (Yangyuan)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Shu, styledYangyuan, was born in Fan in Rancheng. Considered a bit of an idiot when young but a skilled hunter and later became a valued offical to Sima Zhao. Wei Shu was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Wei Shu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
